nodes.label: Macro Chains (1-8)
nodes.detail: Modulation chains whose output drives macro control slots. Any modulator type accepted.

nodes.label: Chain Rendering
nodes.detail: Renders all macro chains via preVoiceRendering(). Reads first sample of each chain output.

nodes.label: Delta Check
nodes.detail: Only sends update if value changed from previous block

nodes.label: Scale to 0-127
nodes.detail: Multiplies 0-1 modulation output by 127 for the macro system

nodes.label: Macro Control System
nodes.detail: Global macro slots that distribute values to connected parameters and MacroModulators
